name: Akeley Community Center
description: Akeley Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Akeley, MN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.

name: Faithbridge Church
description: Faithbridge Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Park Rapids, MN. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include lights.

name: Heartland Park Park Rapids
description: Heartland Park Park Rapids is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Park Rapids, MN. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Nevis School Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Nevis School Gym in Nevis, MN! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.
